summary: The user is experiencing sleep difficulties and is seeking advice on establishing a consistent bedtime routine. They plan to incorporate reading and relaxation techniques into their routine while avoiding screens before bed to improve sleep quality.
facts: The user went to bed around 11:45 PM last night, which is later than they prefer. The user usually starts getting ready for bed around 11:15 PM. The user is trying to read for at least 20 minutes before bed but often gets too engrossed in their book. The user plans to use a physical book for bedtime reading to avoid blue light exposure. The user intends to set a reminder on their phone to put it away at 10:15 PM every night. The user will find a comfortable spot in their bedroom to read or relax before bed. The user might ask a friend or family member to hold them accountable for their "no screens" rule. The user is considering incorporating quick relaxation techniques into their bedtime routine. The user is interested in creating a calming pre-sleep routine to improve their sleep quality.
